_info.name: Web Search MCP
_info.description: Gradio-hosted web search MCP server. Provides real-time web search, news search, and article content extraction for AI agents.
_info._usage: Pick ONE: 'websearch' (online SSE) or 'websearch-brave' (local npx, needs BRAVE_API_KEY)

websearch.description: [ONLINE] Real-time web search + news + content extraction via Gradio MCP SSE
_alternatives: Use npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-brave-search if you have a Brave API key
Or: uvx mcp-server-fetch for URL fetching

websearch-brave.description: [LOCAL] Brave Search MCP — set BRAVE_API_KEY in .agent_bashrc
